reviews.review_description: Hello, developers of Lethal Vortex. I’d really like to ask you to create a game called “Lethal Ape 4,” featuring the map from Update 9 (I'm referring to the version of the game where you could close doors with a button and the “backrooms” area was on the fourth floor. That's Update 9). Add monsters such as: Ashy, Sandman, Goo goo gus, Gus, Big Guy, Taller, Darkness, Saw, Ape-1, Lurker, Fred, Lost, Crawly, Johnny, Goop, Screamer, and Gisser (like the monster Gus, only he’s completely black with just small white eyes, and he also makes the “Wake Up the President” sound). You could also add a forest location where the Ape-1 monster appears, as well as a monitor with cameras. Another request is that you release this game on the Meta Quest Store and don’t give it a low age rating, so that violence like in this game (Lethal Vortex) can be included. Please make it so that when you turn on the flashlight, it appears in your hand. Add a new location called “Ventilation Maze,” which will feature a “Crawly” monster. Please make it so that players can find gold, copper, iron, and diamonds in the game (diamonds were in "Lethal Ape 3") and use them to purchase cosmetic items in the store (basically, like in "Lethal Vortex"), Here’s an example: iron yields 3 in-game currency, copper yields 2 in-game currency, gold yields 5 in-game currency, and a diamond yields 10 in-game currency. Please include music from the original "Lethal Ape" game in the lobby. Add a pool on the ground floor near the elevator. Could you please replace the boombox music with the original track from the game “Lethal Ape”? It would give players a sense of nostalgia. Please make a game with these monsters, because many players want Lethal Ape 4. I know you're busy working on “Lethal Vortex” right now, and that's great. But when you have some free time, please get back to “LA4” as a separate project. Good luck with your work!

I love the game and could you PLEASE bring back old lethal ape 4 with all the monsters like kus dus gooba saw and the others and the backrooms map i miss that version pls the new version is boring and also the old flashlight that you have to hold
The Color doesn't work in game and I want color
This game is vey fun must try
